scripts.dev: npm run config:web && npx wrangler dev
scripts.deploy: npm run config:web && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.check: node --check public/app.js && node --check public/service-worker.js && node --check src/worker.js && node --check scripts/generate-runtime-config.js
scripts.cap:sync: npm run config:native && npx cap sync
scripts.android:sync: npm run config:native && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
